headline: NASA will wear high-tech Prada long johns to the Moon
summary: NASA astronauts will wear Prada-designed Liquid Cooling and Ventilation Garments (LCVG). These high-tech base layers are for AxEMU spacesuits on Artemis IV Moon missions. The LCVG is crucial for keeping crew comfortable in 2028.

headline: The 7 biggest storylines from Summer Game Fest 2026
summary: Summer Game Fest 2026 showcased major announcements despite industry challenges. Keynotes focused on game strength, largely ignoring hardware details. The event featured surprisingly hectic activity over its week-long duration.

headline: Persona 6 exists, and that’s all we know
summary: Atlus confirmed the existence of Persona 6 with a brief teaser. This announcement follows the Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy conclusion. Japanese RPG fans had a strong showing at this year's Summer Game Fest.

headline: Microsoft’s Xbox 25th anniversary console comes in translucent green
summary: Microsoft unveiled a special edition Xbox Series X for its 25th anniversary. The console and controller feature a translucent green design. Its aesthetic pays homage to the original Xbox console.

headline: Rick and Morty Season 9, Episode 3 Review: "Rick Fu Hustle"
summary: "Rick Fu Hustle" is a fun installment of Rick and Morty Season 9. The episode is noted for being somewhat scatterbrained and unfocused. A full review provides deeper insights into the new episode.

headline: The Vampire Lestat’s Rolin Jones Reveals What to Pay Special Attention to in the Season Premiere, ‘Detroit’
summary: Showrunner Rolin Jones discusses the new season of "The Vampire Lestat." He highlights key elements for viewers in the premiere episode, 'Detroit.' The season focuses on Lestat's ascension as a rock star.

headline: See 5 New Magic: The Gathering | Marvel Super Heroes Card Reveals | IGN Live 2026
summary: Five new Magic: The Gathering | Marvel Super Heroes cards were revealed at IGN Live. The reveal included Hyperion, Supreme hero, a deeper cut Marvel character. The collaboration set is set to launch later this month.

headline: The Legend of Vox Machina Team Preview What's to Come in Season 4 | IGN Live 2026
summary: "The Legend of Vox Machina" Season 4 creative team teased new additions. Beloved Critical Role character Taryon Darrington makes his on-screen debut. Art directors praised the character design for Taryon's "pompous" look.

headline: Vulnerable women lured by illegal sperm donor services on social media
summary: A BBC investigation exposed illegal sperm donor services on social media. Vulnerable women are being targeted by these unregulated services. One donor provided "baby batter" by post for £100, delivered with passata.

headline: M&S launches new traineeship for 1,000 young people
summary: M&S introduced a new traineeship program for 1,000 young individuals. The initiative aims to address youth not in employment, education, or training (NEET). The scheme seeks to tackle a "growing challenge" within the youth demographic.

headline: 'No dead ends': What the Dutch can teach us about tackling youth unemployment
summary: The Netherlands boasts one of the world's lowest youth unemployment rates. Their model offers lessons for other countries tackling this issue. Focus is on preventing 16-24 year olds from being outside education or employment.

headline: How the High Street became a window on our political instability
summary: The decline of High Streets in recent years reflects broader political instability. The state of high streets offers insights into the UK's current challenges. Economic and social changes are visible through storefronts and retail activity.
